info.title: Eshop
info.description:
API Support Contact: b2bsupport@malfini.com

For more contacts, visit www.malfini.com, section Contacts.

To authorize in auth or api-auth login functions, use the username and password from the www.malfini.com e-shop. It is recommended to use the Main Account / User Details section in the e-shop to create a new dedicated account for the purpose of accessing the API.

For the ver parameter, use the current version of the API (4).

get.description: Returns the list of your company's addresses.

200.description: HTTP 200 and list of addresses if OK.

500.description: HTTP 500 in a case of unexpected error.

429.description: HTTP 429 in a case of too many requests.

401.description: HTTP 401 in a case of not being authorized.

head.description: Returns the list of your company's addresses.

200.description: HTTP 200 and list of addresses if OK.

500.description: HTTP 500 in a case of unexpected error.

429.description: HTTP 429 in a case of too many requests.

401.description: HTTP 401 in a case of not being authorized.

post.description: Creates a new address and returns it back.

500.description: HTTP 500 in a case of unexpected error.

429.description: HTTP 429 in a case of too many requests.

401.description: HTTP 401 in a case of not being authorized.

200.description: HTTP 201 and newly created address object if OK.

put.description: Edits the desired address and returns the updated model.

200.description: HTTP 200 and updated address object if OK.

500.description: HTTP 500 in a case of unexpected error.

429.description: HTTP 429 in a case of too many requests.

401.description: HTTP 401 in a case of not being authorized.

post.description:
Returns access token from OAuth server.
Method used for obtaining access token from the authorization server using refresh token
Method used for obtaining access token from the authorization server using login and password
Method used for logging out from the authorization server using refresh token

get.description:
Returns details about delivery methods available. Note that some delivery services may not be available to you in any
country.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: Id of the address you wish to deliver to

401.description: HTTP 401 in a case of not being authorized.

get.description: Returns list of invoices matching the criteria.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmZ format. Only year and month are required, day and time is optional.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmZ format. Only year and month are required, day and time is optional.

parameters.name: variableSymbol
parameters.description: The variable symbol for the payment.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the corresponding order, starting with KT.

parameters.name: customOrderId
parameters.description: Your own custom name or ID for the corresponding order.

parameters.name: paymentStatusId
parameters.description: ID of the status the payment of the invoice is in.

parameters.name: invoiceTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the type of the invoice.

parameters.name: productSizeCode
parameters.description: Nomenclature code of a product on the invoice - 7 A-Z-0-9 characters referring to the commodity, color and size of the product (in case of the goods).

get.description: Returns full list of products (nomenclatures) in portfolio, and detailed information about them.

parameters.name: productCodes
parameters.description: List of product code for filtering, separated by commas. If not specified, return all.

200.description: HTTP 200 and list of products if OK.

500.description: HTTP 500 in a case of unexpected error.

429.description: HTTP 429 in a case of too many requests.

401.description: HTTP 401 in a case of not being authorized.

head.description: Returns full list of products (nomenclatures) in portfolio, and detailed information about them.

parameters.name: productCodes
parameters.description: List of product code for filtering, separated by commas. If not specified, return all.

200.description: HTTP 200 and list of products if OK.

500.description: HTTP 500 in a case of unexpected error.

429.description: HTTP 429 in a case of too many requests.

401.description: HTTP 401 in a case of not being authorized.

get.description:
Returns the amount of individual products which are available in stock. In order to get availability of a certain product for a certain date,
add all availabilities with date equal or previous to the target date. If there are none, or all dates are later than the requested date, the available amount is 0.

parameters.name: productCodes
parameters.description: List of product code for filtering, separated by commas. If not specified, return all.

parameters.name: includeFuture
parameters.description: Indicates whether to filter only current availabilities or include future ones.

head.description:
Returns the amount of individual products which are available in stock. In order to get availability of a certain product for a certain date,
add all availabilities with date equal or previous to the target date. If there are none, or all dates are later than the requested date, the available amount is 0.

parameters.name: productCodes
parameters.description: List of product code for filtering, separated by commas. If not specified, return all.

parameters.name: includeFuture
parameters.description: Indicates whether to filter only current availabilities or include future ones.

name.description: Your own naming of the address.

shortName.description: Your own shorthand naming of the address.

city.description: The city name corresponding to the zipCode, source: https://www.geonames.org/.

phone.description: The contact phone in the +NNN-NNNNNNNNN format (or similar, as appropriate for your country).

fax.description: The +NNN-NNNNNNNNN format (or similar, as appropriate for your country).

invoiceDeliveryId.description: How the invoice is to be delivered - for more info see invoice-delivery-type.

isValid.description: Marks whether the address is valid and can be ordered to.

id.description: The unique ID of the address.

name.description: Your own name of the address.

recipientName.description: Recipient's name on the shipping label.

street.description: The street name and house number.

isValid.description: Marks whether the address is valid and can be ordered to.

orderCode.description: The code of the newly created order.

productSizeCode.description:
Nomenclature code - 7 A-Z-0-9 characters referring to the commodity, color and size of the product (in case of the
goods).

invoiceDeliveryTypeId.description: ID of the invoice delivery method used.

addressId.description: ID of the address - the address has to be created prior to the order, and has to be valid.

deliveryId.description: ID of the delivery method - the delivery method has to be available for the given address.

paymentId.description: ID of the payment method - the payment method has to be compatible with the delivery method.

deliveryDate.description: The date when the goods are to arrive. If not entered, the closest one available will be chosen.

customOrderId.description: Your own custom name or ID for the order.

note.description: Additional note for the customer service. Entering it may delay the expedition process.

isPackingListForPrint.description: If true, the packing list will be printed and included in the package.

products.description: Contains information about items within the order.

contactEmailAddress.description: Email address used for contact when personal takeover delivery method is selected.

contactPhoneNumber.description: Phone number used for contact when personal takeover delivery method is selected.

status.description: Status of the product within the complaint.

name.description: Full name of the nomenclature (or product).

code.description:
Nomenclature code - 7 A-Z-0-9 characters referring to the commodity, color and size of the product (in case of the
goods).

description.description:
Description (note) which was entered when the complaint was filed. If none was entered, generated based off the
content.

amount.description: The amount of pieces of the given nomenclature the complaint is filed for.

unitExpectedPrice.description:
The price which was expected, contrary to which was charged. If the price is not the subject of the complaint, this
value is 0.

currencyCode.description: The code of the currency the unitExpectedPrice is in. Empty if unitExpectedPrice is 0.

isCanceled.description: Whether the complaint was cancelled for this product.

isReturn.description: Whether the goods are being returned.

type.description: Name of the type of the complaint filed for this product.

name.description: The recipient company name on the goods return address.

street.description: The street and number on the goods return address.

city.description: The city name on the goods return address.

countryName.description: The country name on the goods return address.

zipCode.description: The zip code on the goods return address.

recipient.description: The recipient name on the goods return address.

phone.description: The contact number to obtain more information about your complaint.

email.description: The contact email to obtain more information about your complaint.

contractId.description: The ID of the contract (order) the complaint has been filed for. Starting with KT.

date.description: The date and time when the complaint was filed.

note.description: A brief summarization of the complaint, generated out of its contents, or entered manually by the user.

complaintMainStatus.description: The current status of the complaint - reflects whether the complaint was accepted or refused.

statusName.description: The current status of the complaint - reflects the status the complaint is in within the workflow.

wayOfReturnGoods.description: The way in which the goods are to be returned.

customerInstruction.description: The preferred way of resolving the complaint.

hasReturns.description: Whether there are any goods to be returned.

isPickupCreated.description: Whether there was transport (pick-up service) already created. For doing so, use the e-shop.

isWithPickup.description: Whether there is a transport (pick-up service) .

products.description: All products and information about them in the complaint.

date.description: Date and time the complaint was filed in.

id.description: The unique ID of the complaint.

type.description: Type of the complaint (generated out of its contents).

status.description: The current status of the complaint.

description.description: Description (note) which was entered when the complaint was filed. If none was entered, generated based off the type.

deliveryId.description: The unique ID of the delivery allowed on the given country. Check for more in delivery-method.

id.description: The unique ID of the delivery method.

code.description: Shorthand code of the delivery method.

name.description: The full name of the delivery method.

deliveryId.description: The ID of the delivery method.

paymentId.description: The ID of an allowed payment method.

id.description: The unique invoice delivery type ID.

name.description: The full name of the invoice delivery type.

complaintAllowed.description: Whether it is still possible to return or claim.

isTransportInvoice.description: Whether the invoice is for Malfini transportation service.

issueNoteId.description: The ID of the issue note.

orderId.description: The unique ID of the corresponding order, starting with KT.

orderDocumentId.description: The unique ID of the delivery within the order the invoice is for.

customOrderId.description: Your own custom name or ID for the corresponding order.

invoiceAddressStreet.description: The invoice's address street and number line.

deliveryAddressStreet.description: The delivery address street and number line.

mainAddressStreet.description: The main address street and number line.

variableSymbol.description: The variable symbol for the payment.

constantSymbol.description: The constant symbol for the payment.

supplierVatNumber.description: The VAT number of the supplier.

bankCode.description: The supplier's bank account's bank code.

dueDate.description: The due date of the invoice payment.

deliveryName.description: The name of the delivery type.

paymentMethodName.description: The name of the payment method.

issuedBy.description: Who was the invoice issued by.

invoiceDeliveryTypeName.description: The method delivering the invoice document.

initialText.description: Description of what the invoice is for.

currencyCode.description: The code of the payment currency.

variableSymbol.description: The variable symbol for the payment.

complaintAllowed.description: Whether it is still possible to return or claim.

dueDate.description: The due date of the invoice.

foreignExchangeToPay.description: The total amount left to pay.

currencyCode.description: The code of the payment currency.

invoiceDate.description: The date the invoice was issued at.

issueNoteId.description: The ID of the issue note.

order.description: The unique ID of the corresponding order, starting with KT.

exchangeRate.description: The exchange rate for the item.

productCode.description: The code of the item (equal to productSizeCode for products).

vatRate.description: The percentage value of the VAT rate.

itemTypeName.description: The name of the item type.

addressCity.description: The city name on the address.

addressRecipient.description: The recipient's name on the address.

addressStreet.description: The street name and house number.

customerBankAccountNumber.description:
The bank account number for the payment from your customer to be sent to. Used if you have used direct to your
customer service combined with cash on delivery.

customerBankCode.description:
The bank account code for the payment from your customer  to be sent to. Used if you have used direct to your
customer service combined with cash on delivery.

customerVariableSymbol.description:
The variable symbol for the payment from your customer  to be sent with. Used if you have used direct to your
customer service.

isCashOnDelivery.description: Whether there is cash on delivery to be paid.

cashOnDeliveryPrice.description: Price to be paid on delivery, if cash on delivery payment method was used.

confirmedRevision.description: The number of order's revision the delivery is part of.

currencyCode.description: The code of the currency for the payment.

customerAddressCity.description: The city name on the address, used if you have used direct to your customer service.

customerAddressCountry.description: The country on the address, used if you have used direct to your customer service.

customerAddressName.description: Your name of the address, used if you have used direct to your customer service.

customerAddressRecipient.description: The recipient's name on the address, used if you have used direct to your customer service.

customerAddressStreet.description: The street name and house number, used if you have used direct to your customer service.

customerAddressZipCode.description: The zip code, used if you have used direct to your customer service.

customerEmail.description: The customer's contact email, used if you have used direct to your customer service.

customerPhone.description: The customer's contact phone number, used if you have used direct to your customer service.

customerAttachInvoice.description:
Whether your own invoice is to be added into the package before shipping, used if you have used direct to your
customer service.

customerIsOwnAddress.description:
Whether the return address on the shipping label is to be our warehouse address, or the delivery address you chose
for the order. Used if you have used direct to your customer service.

despatchDate.description: The date when the order is to be despatched.

isCustomer.description: Whether the direct to your customer service was used.

deliveryStatus.description: The status name of the delivery.

items.description: Contains information about items within the order.

orderDeliveryRevision.description: The id of the revision the delivery is part of.

netPrice.description: The total price, without VAT applied.

price.description: The total price, with VAT applied.

requiredDeliveryDate.description: The required delivery date of the order.

taxationType.description: Indicates, whether VAT is to be applied.

id.description: The unique ID of the given delivery within the order.

shippedAmount.description: The amount of pieces which was actually shipped.

netPrice.description: Total net price of the items.

nomenclatureCode.description:
Nomenclature code - 7 A-Z-0-9 characters referring to the commodity, color and size of the product (in case of the
goods).

nomenclatureId.description: Internal unique ID of the nomenclature.

unitNetPrice.description: Net price of a single item.

orderRevision.description: ID of the order's revision the item was added in.

confirmDate.description: Date and time when the order was confirmed (placed).

confirmedBy.description: Username of the customer service employee who confirmed the last contract's revision.

confirmedRevision.description: ID of the current order's revision. Only the newest one is being returned.

note.description: Additional note for the customer service.

delivery.description: Name of the delivery method used.

invoiceDeliveryType.description: Name of the invoice delivery method used.

customOrderId.description: Your own custom name or ID for the order.

status.description: Name of the current status the order is in.

paymentMethod.description: Name of the payment method used.

paymentMethodCode.description: Shorthand code of the payment method. used.

deliveries.description: Contains information about individual deliveries within the order.

orderCode.description: The unique order ID, starting with KT.

deliveryDateFirst.description: The first delivery date within the order.

deliveryDateLast.description: The last delivery date within the order (same as the first one if only 1 was used).

netPrice.description: The price of the order, without VAT applied.

isPaymentDone.description: Whether the order was already paid for.

unpaidAmount.description:
The remaining amount to be paid for the order. Note that for actually processing the payment, you currently need to
use the e-shop.

price.description: The final price of the order, with VAT applied.

unpaidAmountCurrencyCode.description: The currency code for the payment.

order.description: The unique order ID, starting with KT.

addressId.description: The unique address ID the order was shipped to.

addressName.description: The name of the address the order was shipped to.

status.description: The unique ID of the order's status.

customOrderId.description: Own custom order number, if you have entered any when placing the order.

requiredDeliveryDate.description: The due date of the delivery.

id.description: The ID of the payment method.

code.description: Unique code of the product attribute.

date.description:
Date of the stock amount. There may be several different dates and associated quantities for 1 given productSizeCode,
representing more goods being on the way to the warehouse.

productSizeCode.description:
Nomenclature code - 7 A-Z-0-9 characters referring to the commodity, color and size of the product (in case of the
goods).

viewCode.description: A-Z single letter view code of the product image.

code.description: The 3-character alphanumeric code of the product.

categoryName.description: The name of the category the product belongs to.

gender.description: The product's gender (or width in case of boots).

subtitle.description: The product's subtitle on the e-shop.

productCardPdf.description: Link to the product's product card in the given language.

sizeChartPdf.description: Link to the product's size chart.

userInformationPdf.description: Link to the product's user information file.

declarationPdf.description: Link to the declaration about the product.

technicalSpecificationPdf.description: Link to the product's technical specification.

certificationPdf.description: Link to the product's certification file.

additionalInformationPdf.description: Link to the product's additional information file.

alternatives.description: The alternatives to this product (different genders).

variants.description: The variants the product is available in (for example colors).

productSizeCode.description: Nomenclature code - 7 A-Z-0-9 characters referring to the commodity, color and size of the product.

limit.description:
Minimum amount of pieces which need to be ordered for this price to apply. Note that this quantity discount may stack
up with other products with the same price, within the same commodity.

currency.description: The currency the price is in.

productSizeCode.description: Nomenclature code - 7 A-Z-0-9 characters referring to the commodity, color and size of the product.

currency.description: The currency the price is in.

outlet.description: Discount on obsolete items. Null if the item is not on sale.

expeditionQuantity.description: The minimum amount for expedition to be allowed.

sizeCode.description: Unique code of the variant's size.

boxDepth.description: The depth (in cm) of a full wrap package

boxHeight.description: The height (in cm) of a full wrap package

boxWidth.description: The width (in cm) of a full wrap package

boxCapacity.description: The capacity (in pieces) of a full wrap package

netWeight.description: The net weight (in kg) of a single piece of the product

grossWeight.description: The gross weight (in kg) of a single piece of the product

volume.description: Volume (in litres) of a single piece

code.description: The variant's unique code (part of the product's nomenclature).

colorCode.description: Unique code of the given color of this product variant.

attributes.description: Additional parameters related to the product variant.

images.description: Contains images of the product variant.

collections.description: The collections this variant belongs to

nomenclatures.description: The individual nomenclatures (or subvariants) under the product.

Cookies.description: JWT Authorization header using the Cookie scheme

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme
